features: DUZZIT SPONGE SCOURERS: Keep your dishes sparkling clean with this dual sided sponge scourer
PERFECTLY CLEAN: The dual side design provides a soft sponge for delicate cleaning, the reverse side is a tough green scouring pad to remove even the most stubborn food deposits and dirt

VERSATILE: In the home, perfect to remove dirt and grease from the dishes, pot, pans, oven trays and racks, kitchen worktops, sinks and baths. Outdoors use the scourer to clean a barbecue grill and garden furniture
TOUGH ON SURFACES: The durable sponge scourer is ideal sink side in the kitchen or bathroom to keep surfaces sparkling clean
description: Product Description Duzzit Sponge Scourers keep your surfaces and dishes sparkling clean. The dual sided design provides a soft sponge for delicate cleaning, the reverse side is a tough green scouring pad to remove even the most stubborn food deposits and dirt. Pack of 20 scourers. Ingredients sponge Box Contains 20 sponge scourers Manufacturer Contact Information Duzzit Multicoloured Sponge Scourers 20 pack See more
